visa_types.name: Dutch Passports/ID Card
visa_types.documents_required:
Get all the required documents (checklist)
It is important for your passport or ID card
                                                                        application that you bring the correct documents
                                                                        with you. Please visit netherlandsworldwide.nl (https://www.netherlandsworldwide.nl/countries/australia/living-and-working/applying-for-a-passport-or-id-card-when-you-live-abroad)
                                                                        and follow the instructions given below:
- It is mandatory to create your personal
                                                                            checklist.
- For every document submitted, you must
                                                                            provide the original (to show at the
                                                                            counter) and a photocopy (to be attached to
                                                                            the passport file). You must also provide a
                                                                            copy of the holder page of your passport.
                                                                            Check if you need to have original legalised (https://www.netherlandsworldwide.nl/legalisation/foreign-documents/australia). The
                                                                            documents must have been drawn up in (or
                                                                            translated into) Dutch, English, French or
                                                                            Spanish.
- It is imperative that the photograph
                                                                            submitted at the time of application must
                                                                            fall within the specifications (https://www.government.nl/documents/leaflets/2015/01/21/photomatrix-guidelines-2007).
                                                                            Unacceptable photographs, that do not meet
                                                                            the specifications, will not be accepted for
                                                                            submission.
- Please book an online appointment (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/apt/en/nld/book-an-appointment-email).
What happens to my old passport or ID
                                                                            card?
If you did not hand your old passport or ID card
                                                                        in when you submitted your application, please
                                                                        bring it with you when you come to collect your
                                                                        new one. The consulate-general or VFS global
                                                                        will cancel your old passport or ID card and
                                                                        then return it to you.
If your old document contains visas or residence
                                                                        permits that are still valid and you want to
                                                                        keep those pages intact, you should make this
                                                                        known beforehand.
visa_types.visa_fees:
- For the official passport and ID card fees
                                                                            charged by the Dutch government, click here (https://www.netherlandsworldwide.nl/countries/australia/living-and-working/consular-fees).
- VFS charges an additional service fee:

[Table:
                                                                          Dutch Passports/ID Card]
All fees can be paid by credit card or debit
                                                                        card.
Cash, cheque payments and direct bank transfers
                                                                        are not accepted.
All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time: It can take up to 4 weeks to process your application. You may be asked to provide additional documents by the Dutch Ministry of Foreign Affairs once you have submitted your application. In that case, processing may take longer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
VFS Global accepts both applications for
                                                                                renewals, as well as first applications
                                                                                for a Dutch passport or identity card.
                                                                                All applications will be forwarded to
                                                                                the Dutch Ministry of Foreign Affairs
                                                                                for assessment. Please note that every
                                                                                individual is required to be present at
                                                                                the time of submission of the
                                                                                passport/ID card application. 
You can also apply for a new Dutch
                                                                                passport or identity card at if your
                                                                                previously issued Dutch travel document
                                                                                is lost or stolen. If you are no longer
                                                                                in possession of your passport or ID
                                                                                card, you can only apply at VFS if you
                                                                                have a copy of the missing document.
                                                                                Please note that VFS does not issue
                                                                                emergency travel documents or
                                                                                laissez-passers. If you need to travel
                                                                                urgently, please check Applying for an
                                                                                emergency travel document in Australia |
                                                                                Netherlands Worldwide  (https://www.netherlandsworldwide.nl/passport-id-card/emergency-document/apply-australia)or contact the
                                                                                24/7 Contact Center Netherlandsworldwide
                                                                                on
                                                                                02 8305 6800 (cost of a local call) to
                                                                                seek advice.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
VFS Global accepts both applications for
                                                                                renewals, as well as first applications
                                                                                for a Dutch passport or identity card.
                                                                                All applications will be forwarded to
                                                                                the Dutch Ministry of Foreign Affairs
                                                                                for assessment. Please note that every
                                                                                individual is required to be present at
                                                                                the time of submission of the
                                                                                passport/ID card application. 
You can also apply for a new Dutch
                                                                                passport or identity card at if your
                                                                                previously issued Dutch travel document
                                                                                is lost or stolen. If you are no longer
                                                                                in possession of your passport or ID
                                                                                card, you can only apply at VFS if you
                                                                                have a copy of the missing document.
                                                                                Please note that VFS does not issue
                                                                                emergency travel documents or
                                                                                laissez-passers. If you need to travel
                                                                                urgently, please check Applying for an
                                                                                emergency travel document in Australia |
                                                                                Netherlands Worldwide  (https://www.netherlandsworldwide.nl/passport-id-card/emergency-document/apply-australia)or contact the
                                                                                24/7 Contact Center Netherlandsworldwide
                                                                                on
                                                                                02 8305 6800 (cost of a local call) to
                                                                                seek advice.

## Fees
- For the official passport and ID card fees
                                                                            charged by the Dutch government, click here (https://www.netherlandsworldwide.nl/countries/australia/living-and-working/consular-fees).
- VFS charges an additional service fee:

[Table:
                                                                          Dutch Passports/ID Card]
All fees can be paid by credit card or debit
                                                                        card.
Cash, cheque payments and direct bank transfers
                                                                        are not accepted.
All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Get all the required documents (checklist)
It is important for your passport or ID card
                                                                        application that you bring the correct documents
                                                                        with you. Please visit netherlandsworldwide.nl (https://www.netherlandsworldwide.nl/countries/australia/living-and-working/applying-for-a-passport-or-id-card-when-you-live-abroad)
                                                                        and follow the instructions given below:
- It is mandatory to create your personal
                                                                            checklist.
- For every document submitted, you must
                                                                            provide the original (to show at the
                                                                            counter) and a photocopy (to be attached to
                                                                            the passport file). You must also provide a
                                                                            copy of the holder page of your passport.
                                                                            Check if you need to have original legalised (https://www.netherlandsworldwide.nl/legalisation/foreign-documents/australia). The
                                                                            documents must have been drawn up in (or
                                                                            translated into) Dutch, English, French or
                                                                            Spanish.
- It is imperative that the photograph
                                                                            submitted at the time of application must
                                                                            fall within the specifications (https://www.government.nl/documents/leaflets/2015/01/21/photomatrix-guidelines-2007).
                                                                            Unacceptable photographs, that do not meet
                                                                            the specifications, will not be accepted for
                                                                            submission.
- Please book an online appointment (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/apt/en/nld/book-an-appointment-email).
What happens to my old passport or ID
                                                                            card?
If you did not hand your old passport or ID card
                                                                        in when you submitted your application, please
                                                                        bring it with you when you come to collect your
                                                                        new one. The consulate-general or VFS global
                                                                        will cancel your old passport or ID card and
                                                                        then return it to you.
If your old document contains visas or residence
                                                                        permits that are still valid and you want to
                                                                        keep those pages intact, you should make this
                                                                        known beforehand.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants must ensure that they bring a passport photograph which meets the official requirements for a Dutch passport/ID card, see Photo matrix model 2020 (https://www.rijksoverheid.nl/onderwerpen/paspoort-en-identiteitskaart/documenten/brochures/2020/03/23/fotomatrix-2020). If you apply for both a passport and ID card, you need to submit 2 photographs.
See also: Having Dutch passport photos taken in Australia | NetherlandsWorldwideL (https://www.netherlandsworldwide.nl/passport-id-card/getting-photo/australia). In the event your photo does not meet the requirements, VFS can also take a new photo for you at an additional cost – see Additional Services | vfsglobal (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/apt/en/nld/additional-services).

## Processing Time
It can take up to 4 weeks to process your application. You may be asked to provide additional documents by the Dutch Ministry of Foreign Affairs once you have submitted your application. In that case, processing may take longer.
